options.name: --version
options.description: Prints the version to STDOUT and exits.

options.name: --show_license
options.description: Prints the software license to STDOUT and exits.

options.name: --show_credits
options.description:
Prints the third-party notices and credits to
STDOUT and exits.

options.name: --show_readme
options.description: Prints the readme to STDOUT and exits.

options.name: --show_source
options.description:
Prints the link to the source code to STDOUT and
exits.
--show_supported_types Prints a list of the supported AssemblyAttributes
that can be migrated to STDOUT and exits.

options.name: --project_path
options.description:
The path to the csproj to process.  If not
specified, tries to search for a csproj with the
same name as the current directory.

options.name: --assembly_info_path
options.description:
The path to the AssemblyInfo.cs file.  If not
specified, tries to search in the Properties
directory in the same directory as csproj file.

options.name: --delete_old_assembly_info
options.description:
If specified, the old AssemblyInfo.cs file will be
deleted if there is nothing else remaining
inside of it.

options.name: --migrate_unsupported_types
options.description:
If specified, unsupported types will be attempted
to migrated by using the 'AssemblyAttribute' XML
element.

options.name: --dry_run
options.description:
If specified, no files will be changed, but
instead what will happen will be printed to
STDOUT.

options.name: --no_backup
options.description:
If specified, backups of the files that will be
changed will not be created.

options.name: --version_source
options.description:
the csproj.  However, the version number can
come from a number of attriutes.  This selects
which assembly attribute to grab the version
from.  exclude_version to not include a Version
tag in the csproj.  use_assembly_version to use
the AssemblyVersionAttribute for the Version tag
in the csproj.  use_file_version to use the
AssemblyFileVersionAttribute for the Version tag
in the csproj.  use_informational_version to use
the AssemblyInformationalVersionAttribute for
the Version tag in the csproj.

options.name: --define
options.description:
Add a preprocessor define/symbol when parsing the
AssemblyInfo file.  Multiple defines can be
added.

options.name: --assembly_company_behavior
options.description:
How to handle 'System.Reflection.
AssemblyCompanyAttribute'.  migrate (default) -
migrate to csproj.  delete - remove from
AssemblyInfo do not put in csproj.  leave -
leave in the AssemblyInfo file

options.description:
